_meta.purpose: Allow-list of SJT BA scenarios that should be injected into questions.js / questions.json. Scenarios not listed here stay in their source JSON (questions_ba_samples.json / data/questions_ba_batch.json) but are NOT shipped to the UI. Re-enable a scenario by adding its set_id below.
_meta.rubric: Scenarios listed here are the first curated batch for user practice. The remaining hidden scenarios will be regraded against §9 of SJT_BA_PROCESS.md in a second pass before activation.
_meta.coverage: 6 scenarios per stream, covering all 5 ONVA BA competencies (PC2, AG2, CO2, SO2, CL2) as primaries across CRIT and AGIL streams.
